zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Vieuxpont I於大約1110年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比時，他的父親Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Appleby26歲，母親Maude de Curveville23歲。他與Emma St Hilary結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1174年在蘇格蘭Linlithgowshire卡利登享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Vieuxpont I于大约1110年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比时，他的父亲Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Appleby26岁，母亲Maude de Curveville23岁。他与Emma St Hilary结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1174年在苏格兰Linlithgowshire卡利登享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Vieuxpont I was born about 1110, in Appleby, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Appleby, was 26 and his mother, Maude de Curveville, was 23. He married Emma St Hilary. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1174, in Carriden, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Vieuxpont I est né environ 1110, à Appleby, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Appleby, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maude de Curveville, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Emma St Hilary. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1174, à Carriden, Linlithgowshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Vieuxpont I um 1110 in Appleby, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Appleby 26 und seine Mutter Maude de Curveville 23. Er hat Emma St Hilary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1174 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Carriden, Linlithgowshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Vieuxpont I è nato il circa 1110 nel Appleby, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Appleby, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Maude de Curveville, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Emma St Hilary. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1174, nel Carriden, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Vieuxpont Iが約1110年にイギリスウエストモーランドアップレビーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Applebyは26歳，母Maude de Curvevilleは23歳であった。Emma St Hilaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1174年にスコットランドLinlithgowshireカーリデンで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Vieuxpont I(이)가 대략 1110년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Appleby(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude de Curveville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Emma St Hilary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1174년 스컷랜드 Linlithgowshire 카라이든에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Appleby, Westmorland, England: Appleby, Westmōringaland, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Vieuxpont I nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Appleby, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Maude de Curveville, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma St Hilary. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1174, em Carriden, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Vieuxpont I родился около 1110 г. в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Appleby было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude de Curveville, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma St Hilary. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1174 г. в местности карриден, Linlithgowshire, Шотландия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Vieuxpont I nació aproximadamente 1110, en Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert II De Vipont, Baron Vipont of Appleby, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Maude de Curveville, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Emma St Hilary. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1174, en Carriden, Linlithgowshire, Scotland, a la edad de 65 años.
